reference: Hi there! Your description does not refer to a fracture, definitely! Try to palpate the nasal bone on both sides; if it is painful, then a fracture is possible. You should be concerned if the nose is deformed. Undisplaced nasal fractures will heal over time. You can obtain an X-ray to confirm the diagnosis and to ease your mind. I hope this helps.
text: Hi there. Your description does not refer to a fracture. Definitely, try to palpate the nasal bone on both sides. If it is painful, then a fracture is possible. You should be concerned if the nose is deformed. Undisplaced nasal fractures will heal over time. You can obtain an X-ray to confirm the diagnosis and ease your mind. I hope this helps.
